title: 🧠 Mnemonic Implosion Fields
name: Mnemonic Implosion Fields
what_it_is: Zones where memory cannot survive—cognitive black holes that implode recollection, rendering events unknowable once entered.
how_to_use: she steps into the implosion field—her name unravels inside her
they speak around it—the thing no one remembers doing
animation_behavior: Visuals fade and flicker at edges, names lose sound, viewers forget what they saw moments before ---
